landing.subtitle: KhetSetu reads your soil data and turns it into a fertilizer plan, a crop shortlist and a season-long task list — built for the Indian farmer, in your own language.
landing.trustNote: Free to start · No credit card needed
landing.featuresTitle: Everything your farm needs, in one place
landing.featuresSubtitle: Twelve focused tools, all reading from the same soil and farm profile — no re-entering data, no guesswork.
landing.feature1Desc: Enter or upload your soil report and get an instant health score, fertility grade and fertilizer plan.
landing.feature2Desc: AI matches your soil, water source and season against a crop database to rank what to plant next.
landing.feature3Desc: Upload a leaf photo to flag likely disease, severity and treatment steps before it spreads.
landing.feature4Desc: Localized forecasts and irrigation timing so water and effort aren't wasted.
landing.feature5Desc: Ask soil, crop or fertilizer questions in your own language, anytime.
landing.feature6Desc: See which schemes — PM-KISAN, PMFBY, KCC — you likely qualify for, matched to your profile.
landing.step1Desc: Land size, water source and location — takes under two minutes.
landing.step2Desc: Enter NPK and pH values, or upload a lab report.
landing.step3Desc: Get crop picks, fertilizer doses and reminders built around your numbers.
landing.aboutTitle: Built for the field, not the boardroom
landing.aboutDesc: KhetSetu was designed around how Indian smallholder farms actually work — mixed crops, rainfed land, and decisions that need to be made in minutes, not hours.
landing.footer: Built with care for Indian farmers.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to your farm dashboard.
auth.registerSubtitle: Set up your farm dashboard in a minute.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you reset instructions.
auth.checkEmailDesc: If an account exists for {{email}}, a reset link is on its way.

overview.subtitle: Here's how your farm looks today.
overview.weatherConnectNote: Connect a location in Profile & Farm to see live forecasts and irrigation timing here.
overview.noActivity: No activity yet. Tasks and soil entries will appear here.
overview.noDeficiencies: No major deficiencies detected — maintain current practices.
overview.gradeText: Your soil is graded {{grade}} with a health score of {{score}}/100, indicating {{status}} fertility.

weather.title: Weather Intelligence
weather.demoNotice: Showing sample data — add OPENWEATHER_API_KEY in backend/.env for live weather.
weather.locationDenied: Location access wasn't shared, showing {{city}} by default. Search any city above, or allow location access and try again.
weather.viewingSearched: Showing weather for a searched location.
